stem: The table shows the linear relationship between the number of cars, c, on a commuter train and the maximum number of passengers and crew, p, that the train can carry. Which equation represents the linear relationship between c and p?
explanation: The rate of change is (284 − 174)/(5 − 3) = 55 passengers per car, so p = 55c + b. Using c = 10, p = 559 gives 559 = 550 + b, so b = 9 and p = 55c + 9. Rearranging gives 55c − p = −9.
